---
id: authorization-organization-roles-controller-list
title: "List custom roles"
description: "Get a list of all roles that apply to an organization. This includes both environment roles and custom roles, returned in priority order."
sidebar_label: "List custom roles"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List custom roles"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/authorization/organizations/{organizationId}/roles"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of all roles that apply to an organization. This includes both environment roles and custom roles, returned in priority order.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
